---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Matters

What problem does it solve?

## Area

- [ ] New analysis layer
- [ ] Better scoring / veto logic
- [ ] Execution / scaling
- [ ] Dashboard page or widget
- [ ] Journal analytics
- [ ] Additional data source
- [ ] LLM integration
- [ ] Documentation

## Proposed Approach

If you have an implementation idea, describe it here.
